base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of player_two_luigi_name_label — a ui from 1985 super mario bros. Static 'LUIGI' text label — swaps into Player Name slot when P2 is active (or on P1->P2 alternation after death). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Static 'LUIGI' text label — swaps into Player Name slot when P2 is active (or on P1->P2 alternation after death)
